info.title: PicoBello API
info.description: API documentation for the Floowly backend services.

data.description: Initial data for the workflow execution

403.description: This workflow does not allow API triggers (api_enabled is false)

get.description:
Retrieve all data and steps for a specific execution. JWT required.
When the workflow has a data_structure with file fields (including file sub-fields inside arrays), the response includes
**signed_url** (and execution_data_mapped fields like `{field_name}_signed_url`) as
**full proxy URLs** (same as /api/files/document?token=...), so clients can preview or download
without hitting MinIO directly. Set BACKEND_URL in production so these URLs use your API origin.

200.description: Execution with workflow, steps, logs, and execution_data (file URLs are full proxy URLs)

data.description: Map of field names to values to update

400.description: Field names do not match structure

post.description: Manually trigger the processing of an automatic or agent step.
Mark a step as completed and advance the workflow.
Record a decision for a decision node and advance the workflow.
Upload a file to the documents bucket (multipart). JWT required.

post.summary: Upload a file for an execution

post.description: Upload a file using a multi-part form and an external token.

post.summary: Get a signed or proxy URL for file access
post.description:
Returns a URL to access a file. **For the `documents` bucket** the response is a full proxy URL
(e.g. `https://your-api/api/files/document?token=...`) that streams the file through the API;
use this for execution files and any document so clients never see internal MinIO URLs.
For other buckets, returns a MinIO/S3 presigned URL. Auth is optional (some callers use JWT or API key).

expiresIn.description: Expiration time in seconds (used only for non-documents buckets)

200.description: URL retrieved. For documents bucket, signedUrl is a full proxy URL; otherwise a presigned URL.

signedUrl.description: Full URL for documents bucket (proxy); presigned URL for other buckets

post.summary: Get a short-lived URL to stream a company document

download.description: If true, response suggests attachment download

200.description: Document URL (full URL to stream via API)

403.description: No access to this file's folder

get.summary: Get OCR and AI metadata extraction status for a file
get.description:
Returns OCR status and markdown when available. When an upload requested post-OCR Gemini extraction,
`metadataAiExtractStatus` and related fields reflect progress (`pending`, `processing`, `completed`, `failed`).

404.description: File not found or OCR not started

get.description:
Streams a document using a short-lived JWT in the query string. No auth header required;
used for img/iframe/preview and download links returned by document-url or signed-url (documents bucket).

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Short-lived JWT containing path (and optional download flag)

200.description: File stream (Content-Type and Content-Disposition set by server)

400.description: Missing workflow_step_id or invalid config (e.g. source file not configured)

404.description: Workflow step, execution, or execution step not found

get.description: Get current user, companies, and super_admin flag. JWT required.
For sign up vs sign in on accept page. No auth.
Get invitation details for accept page. No auth.

delete.description: Cancel a pending invitation. JWT, company admin.

get.description: List companies the caller can access. With JWT, returns the user's companies (or all companies if the user is super_admin). With `x-super-admin-api-key` (server-side only), returns all companies. Accepts either Bearer JWT or Super Admin API key.
Get company details. With Super Admin API key (server-side), any company can be accessed without membership.

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Company admin/super-admin only. Include archived executions.

patch.description: Update company (company admin or Super Admin API key). With Super Admin API key (server-side), any company can be updated.

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Company admin/super-admin only. Include steps from archived executions.

post.summary: Invite a user to a company

get.summary: List all group members in company

get.description:
Returns folders for the given parent. User must belong to the company.
**Access:** Only folders the user can access are returned. Company admins see all folders.
For root (no parent_folder_id or empty), only root folders are listed and filtered by permission
(public roots or roots where the user has a user/group permission). For a non-root parent,
returns 403 if the user cannot access that parent; otherwise returns its children.

parameters.name: parent_folder_id
parameters.description: Omit or empty for root folders; set to a folder ID to list its children.

403.description: User does not have access to the requested parent folder

get.description: Returns folder details. Returns 404 if the folder does not exist or the user has no access (same as not found).

404.description: Folder not found or user has no access

403.description: User does not have access to this folder, or write permission required to upload

get.description: Lists permissions for a root folder only. Permissions can only be set on root folders. Requires company admin.

200.description: List of folder permissions (user or group). permission_type read = view/download only; write = upload/delete.

400.description: Permissions can only be set on root folders

post.description: Add a user or group permission on a root folder. Requires company admin. Provide exactly one of user_id or group_id. read = list/open folder, view and download files only; write = read + upload and delete files.

user_id.description: User to grant access (use exactly one of user_id or group_id)

group_id.description: Group to grant access (use exactly one of user_id or group_id)

400.description: Provide exactly one of user_id or group_id; or permission already exists

delete.description: Remove a permission from a root folder. Requires company admin.

get.description:
Returns files in a folder or by a list of IDs. User must belong to the company.
**Access:** When folder_id is set, returns 403 if the user cannot access that folder.
When ids is set (e.g. after metadata search), only files in folders the user can access are returned.
Company admins can access all folders.

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: List files in this folder. Omit or empty for root (returns no files; use folders to browse).

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated file IDs (e.g. from by-metadata). Only files in accessible folders are returned.

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Company admin/super-admin only. Include archived files.

200.description: List of files (filtered by folder access when using ids)

403.description: User does not have access to this folder

get.description:
Returns file IDs matching the given metadata key (and optional value). Used for metadata search.
**Access:** Only file IDs for files in folders the user can access are returned. Company admins see all matches.

200.description: Object with fileIds array (only files in accessible folders)

post.description:
Multipart upload with field `file` repeated 1–25 times. Optional JSON string field `metadata` (array of `{key_id, value}`) applied to each created file.
Set `ocr` to the string `true` to queue OCR per file.
When `ocr` is `true`, optional JSON string `extractMetadataKeyIds` (array of metadata key UUIDs) queues Gemini metadata extraction on the server after OCR completes (same as manual extract).

file.description: One or more files (max 25), same field name repeated

ocr.description: When `true`, OCR is queued for each uploaded file

extractMetadataKeyIds.description: JSON array of metadata key UUIDs; only used when `ocr` is `true`

metadata_ai_extract_status.description: When set at upload with extract keys, tracks pending/processing/completed/failed

post.summary: Auto split a PDF using a split preset
post.description:
Upload a PDF, automatically run OCR, propose a split with Gemini using the chosen preset, accept the proposition, and create the split PDFs.
Options can queue OCR for created PDFs and optionally delete the original uploaded file.

runOcr.description: When `true` (default), OCR is run on the uploaded source PDF before proposing a split

keepOriginalFile.description: When `true`, keep the uploaded source file; default is `false` (delete after split)

ocrCreatedFiles.description: When `true` (default), OCR is queued on each created split PDF

currentDate.description: Optional yyyy-mm-dd reference date for the model

removedOriginal.description: Whether the uploaded source file was deleted (when keepOriginalFile is false)

ocrQueued.description: Whether OCR was queued for created files (when ocrCreatedFiles is true)

400.description: Invalid input, OCR/proposition failed, or split validation failed

post.summary: Extract metadata from OCR using Gemini
post.description: Requires OCR completed (`ocr_status` completed and `ocr_markdown` present). Fills selected metadata keys using the same model as Split PDF.

currentDate.description: Optional yyyy-mm-dd reference date for the model

200.description: Applied non-empty values (keyed by metadata key id)

400.description: OCR not ready, invalid keys, or validation failed
Invalid value for a predefined-list key

delete.description: Deletes the file. Returns 403 if the user does not have access to the file's folder or does not have write permission on that folder.

403.description: User does not have access to the file's folder

409.description: Conflict (e.g. removing an allowed value still in use on a file)

get.description: List workflows visible to the user based on workflow visibility scope and explicit visibility permissions. Optional filter by category.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter by workflow category ID (empty string or "null" for uncategorized)

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Company admin/super-admin only. Include archived workflows.

post.description: Start a new execution for this workflow. Requires workflow to be active and caller to satisfy the workflow start permission policy.

400.description: Missing company ID or workflow ID

404.description: Workflow not found or access denied

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Company admin/super-admin only. Include archived workflows.

200.description: Workflow created or AI needs more info

get.description: List notifications for the current user. JWT required.

InternalApiKey.name: x-internal-api-key
InternalApiKey.description: Used by database triggers and internal services

SuperAdminApiKey.name: x-super-admin-api-key
SuperAdminApiKey.description: Server-side only. When SUPER_ADMIN_API_KEY is set in env, requests with this header get super_admin access (e.g. list all companies, access any company). Never use client-side.
